title: Review Docs
brief: Edit a launch document and keep its review comments and supporting files in the same workspace.
audience: A launch owner revising the release plan while reviewers comment and attach evidence.
scope: Editable document title and body with a saved-state indicator
A review comment thread that accepts new replies and supports deleting a comment
A local attachment area supporting add, drag-drop, and remove
Save persists the document, comments, and attachment metadata to the browser's localStorage; a document reload restores that saved snapshot
Discard changes reverts unsaved edits back to the last saved snapshot
boundaries: No document store, review service, or file backend is connected
Save writes to this browser's localStorage only, not to any server; nothing is synchronized elsewhere
The seed document is illustrative and does not represent a live launch
